::: {.learning-targets}

| # | I can… | Key Skill |
|---|--------|-----------|
| LT1 | Solve one-step equations using inverse operations | Addition, subtraction, multiplication, division |
| LT2 | Solve two-step equations, including brackets and fractions | Two inverse operations in sequence |
| LT3 | Solve equations with unknowns on both sides | Collecting like terms |
| LT4 | Expand brackets and solve the resulting equation | Single and double brackets |
| LT5 | Solve equations involving algebraic fractions | Clearing fractions, cross-multiplication |
| LT6 | Form and solve equations from word problems | Number riddles, ages, geometry, formulas |

:::
